rationale: Keep this pair because the two studies strongly overlap in domain and constructs: both analyze U.S. automobile product recalls, and the cited paper focuses on recall-related social/media effects while the citing paper uses media coverage as a core moderating mechanism. The citing note also explicitly frames its contribution as extending prior business-oriented recall research, which is exactly the lane of the cited JMR recall paper, so this is plausibly more than an incidental mention.
